description: CloudNativePG monitoring dashboard for PostgreSQL clusters on Kubernetes. Monitors cluster health, instance status, replication, WAL archiving, connections, database size, CPU/memory, and backup status.
title: CloudNativePG Overview

026dde4c-2f7f-476c-836d-7784224a586a.name: cnpg_cluster
026dde4c-2f7f-476c-836d-7784224a586a.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'cnpg_cluster') AS cnpg_cluster
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'cnpg_collector_up'
GROUP BY cnpg_cluster

a86f277b-58b6-4252-a071-0488ef90a611.name: cnpg_instance
a86f277b-58b6-4252-a071-0488ef90a611.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'cnpg_instance') AS cnpg_instance
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'cnpg_collector_up'
GROUP BY cnpg_instance

84c8b42c-9686-4a12-977f-b5b3a749cd0d.name: k8s.node.name
84c8b42c-9686-4a12-977f-b5b3a749cd0d.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'k8s.node.name') AS `k8s.node.name`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'cnpg_collector_up'
GROUP BY `k8s.node.name`
